Timing: Start* of spawning to end of fry migration

Timing: Start of fry migration to end of ocean entry
Spatial distribution: Accessible stream reaches with optimal gradient for rearing for the given species (Norris 2024), or known rearing lake for lake-type sockeye CUs

Timing: 3 months before to 3 months after peak ocean entry date

Timing: 3 months after ocean entry to end of run timing

Timing: Start of run timing (freshwater entry) to start of spawning
Spatial distribution: Migration route(s) from freshwater entry point to accessible spawning stream reaches

Timing: Start to end of spawning period
Spatial distribution: Accessible stream reaches with optimal gradient for spawning for the given species (Norris 2024)
